description: Monday 15 December 2025 | Māori Affairs Committee Ngāti Rāhiri Tumutumu Claims Settlement Bill Ngati Tamatera Treaty of Waitangi Negotiators John McEnteer Jamie Watson Daniel Braid Michael Barker Ngati Tumutumu Trust Daniel Braid, Chairperson
descriptionSummary: Ngāti Rāhiri Tumutumu Claims Settlement Bill. Ngati Tamatera Treaty of Waitangi Negotiators. John McEnteer
